welcome.title: Welcome to AI Interview Architect
welcome.description: A quick tour of the core workflow: prepare questions, launch interviews, and review assessments.

complete.title: You're all set
complete.description: Start with New Interview when you're ready. You can replay this tour anytime from the header.

dashboardHero.title: Your command center
dashboardHero.description: The dashboard is your home base for pipeline health and daily priorities.

dashboardActions.title: Start the workflow
dashboardActions.description: Launch a new interview or jump straight into the question bank from here.

questionsLibrary.title: Question bank
questionsLibrary.description: Build and reuse interview questions here before you create a session.

questionsCreate.title: Add a question
questionsCreate.description: Create a new question when you need something tailored to a role or skill area.

interviewIntro.title: Create an interview
interviewIntro.description: Combine candidate details, question selection, and launch in one flow.

interviewCandidate.title: Candidate details
interviewCandidate.description: Enter the candidate name and role so the session is labeled correctly in your pipeline.

interviewPicker.title: Pick questions and launch
interviewPicker.description: Select questions from the bank, then create the interview to send the candidate link.

assessmentsIntro.title: Assessment review
assessmentsIntro.description: After candidates submit responses, review and score interviews from this workspace.

assessmentsBrowse.title: Open an assessment
assessmentsBrowse.description: Each card shows candidate progress — open one to review answers, scores, and AI feedback.

teamHeading.title: Team access
teamHeading.description: Manage who can create interviews, review assessments, and configure the workspace.
